message:
chore(beads): revise test coverage beads after deep audit

Key revisions:
- bd-1qxg: Transport stream/sink ARE tested (44 tests in tests.rs),
  bead now targets adapter-specific edge cases
- bd-1a6j: Renamed from "Flush Out Stubs" — most stubs have real tests
  in submodules (e2e_actor=16, e2e_combinator=74, security=39).
  Focus narrowed to Redis (1 test) and consistency audit
- Removed bd-1mgn as hard blocker for all E2E tasks — existing
  logging infra sufficient, enhancement is independent
- Removed false deps: HTTP E2E no longer blocked by H2 error tests,
  gRPC no longer blocked by service builder tests
- Added correct deps: Multi-Protocol blocked by HTTP+gRPC E2E,
  Cancellation Stress blocked by Runtime Lifecycle
- Added detailed logging + unit test requirements as comments
- Updated platform constraints for reactor backend tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
